name: war-monitor-integrated-server
description: Unified single-site server for monitor.html with live Pikud HaOref integration

scripts.verify: node --check backend/server.js && node --check backend/launchAxisAiEngine.js && node scripts/verify-war-monitor.mjs && node scripts/test-threat-axis.mjs && node scripts/test-launch-axis-ai.mjs
scripts.test:all: npm run verify && cd backend && npm run sim:harness && cd .. && npm run test:browser
